strengths: Three specific, authentic objects are clearly identified and placed in real-world contexts (X-ray, oracle-bone fragment, Nag Hammadi codex).
Explicit and well-supported links are made between each object and the IA prompt, demonstrating understanding of how evidence standards differ across natural sciences, history and religion.
Justifications for inclusion of each object are detailed, with appropriate reference to academic sources and image attributions, showing depth of research and ethical sourcing.
weaknesses: Commentary occasionally becomes verbose and drifts into background or theological detail, reducing analytic focus on criteria for good evidence.
Some secondary terminology (e.g., âabduction,â âempiricismâ) is introduced without sustained linkage back to the prompt, weakening precision.
A few bibliographic and citation inconsistencies (incomplete references, reliance on Wikipedia) undermine the academic rigor of the submission.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work meets the descriptors for band 7â8 by clearly identifying three objects and their contexts, and by providing well-supported, illustrative justifications that link each object to the prompt. The student shows strong interdisciplinary awareness, ethical sourcing and solid evidence of research. However, minor lapses in focusâsuch as overly wordy passages, drifting into theological or treatment details, and occasional precision issues with terminology and citationsâprevent the submission from reaching the top (9â10) band. On balance, the exhibitionâs rigorous structure and insightful analysis merit a lower-end band 7 mark, consistent with the official examinerâs assessment.

annotations.comment: The student effectively introduces the first object with a clear context â a personal X-ray of a broken collarbone â demonstrating a concrete example of evidence from natural sciences.
The description of X-ray imaging is detailed and accurate, illustrating how empirical observation underpins scientific evidence. This strengthens the link to the natural sciences.
The inclusion of full image attributions for the Nag Hammadi and Gospel of Thomas codices underscores attention to ethical sourcing.
Ensure that long URLs are not broken across lines and that access dates are clearly indicated to maintain citation clarity.
The connection to the prompt could be sharpened by explicitly tying the concept of empiricism back to defining âgood evidenceâ for a claim, rather than presenting it as background theory.
The student acknowledges the necessity of reproducibility in X-ray evidence, reinforcing the scientific criterion for reliable observation.
The discussion drifts into treatment considerations rather than focusing strictly on criteria for good evidence, which dilutes the analysis of evidence standards.
Refocus the analysis by linking each limitation of X-ray evidence directly to how it affects the quality of the knowledge claim, rather than expanding into treatment protocols.
The cultural context of the oracle bone is well established, linking personal interest to historical inquiry and grounding the object in a real-world setting.
The student introduces âabductionâ correctly but does not explicitly tie it back to evaluating evidence quality, which weakens the relevance to the prompt.
Clarify how carbon-dating methods directly support the prompt by showing why chronological accuracy counts as good evidence for historical claims.
The recognition of provisional claims in history is insightful, showing awareness that evidence can be incomplete and subject to reinterpretation.
The explanation could benefit from a concrete historical example illustrating how lost evidence changes interpretations, to make the provisional aspect more tangible.
The introduction of additional perspectives on Gnostic texts showcases depth in exploring evidence standards within religious knowledge systems.
The discussion of Athanasiusâs motives shifts into theological territory, reducing the focus on criteria for credible eyewitness testimony as evidence.
Refocus this section by linking Athanasiusâs decisions back to how institutional authority defines acceptable evidence, rather than exploring theological motives.
The argument clearly articulates how multiple gospel authorship and ecclesiastical power influence what counts as good evidence in religious contexts.
The later discussion becomes verbose and drifts into historical detail at the expense of analyzing evidence criteria, which undermines focus.
Condense the description of political motives and highlight directly how institutional endorsement criteria shape accepted evidence in religious knowledge.
The reference list demonstrates extensive research across disciplines, reinforcing the credibility of the exhibitionâs arguments.
The citation for Davis and Sutton is incomplete and lacks details; ensure full bibliographic information is provided to maintain academic rigour.
Verify and standardize URLs and DOIs so that each reference follows a consistent format, enhancing the professionalism of the list.
Including both peer-reviewed articles and primary source image attributions strengthens the depth and reliability of the research.
Exercise caution when using Wikipedia as a source; supplement with scholarly publications to ensure academic reliability.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
